list: May 17: Senior Sunday. Additionally, Women on Mission will be recognizing our kids that are transitioning from pre-school, kindergarten, 6th grade, 8th grade and graduating college.
Women on Mission will meet Monday, April 11 at 6:00 PM to lead decorating for VBS. Judy Rogers is in charge and encourages everyone to come join in.
May 13: The first Beech Creek Round Up of the year at the Samples’ ranch from 6:00-8:00 PM.

Our 2026 VBS, Emerald Crossing, is May 31-June 3 from 6:00-8:00 PM nightly. Please sign up to help on the sheets in the foyer. If you ordered a VBS tee, those are $15 for XL and smaller, $17 for XXL and larger. Please give your payment to Ryan ASAP.
